utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items clearly. Each item contains full details (coverage description and costs where relevant). Health coverage includes physical and mental health components with monthly and annual costs; property coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services specifies enhancement services with costs; total_budget presents a complete monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four LifeFirst-branded components: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services. In the ground-truth data, LifeFirst offers corresponding plans named 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for health and travel, and 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' for property. The additional_services feature (premium membership) corresponds to 'Premium Insurance Membership' in the general_services section. Therefore, the correct mapping is: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health) rating 8, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property) rating 8, LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel) rating 7, and Premium Insurance Membership rating 10.
